title: Hudacko
compiled_truth: Hudacko is an external contact at [Haas](companies/haas). Over the corpus period (1999-09-20 to 2001-12-14), Hudacko sent 4 and received 73 emails, totalling 77 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dasovich](people/dasovich-haas) (3), [Esarte](people/esarte-haas) (2), [Mkang](people/mkang-haas) (2), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (2), [Martin Esarte](people/martin-esarte-clorox) (1).
